title: DomainRelationship
description: Typed directional association between two domain identities. Establishes the formal relationship vocabulary for the ONT platform. The six founding relationships (guardian-provisions-rbacprofile, guardian-signs-conductor, conductor-signs-clusterpack, platform-creates-runnerconfig, seam-core-tracks-lineage, wrapper-creates-packexecution) are declared as DomainRelationship instances. No controller runs at Layer 0.

sourceIdentity.description: Name of the DomainIdentity that is the source (subject) of this relationship.

targetIdentity.description: Name of the DomainIdentity that is the target (object) of this relationship.

relationshipType.description: Typed directional classification of the relationship. Controlled vocabulary owned by Seam Core shared library (CLAUDE.md Section 14 Decision 5).

protocol.description: Communication or trust protocol used in this relationship (e.g., ed25519, rbac, grpc, kubernetes-admission, kubernetes-api).

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the directional association and its operational significance.

bindingStability.description: Binding stability descriptor for this relationship.

conditions.description: Standard Kubernetes condition array for this resource.
